---
name: Feature request
about: A new check, a new module, a new output format, a new integration — anything you wish GateTest could do.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What goes wrong today without this feature? Don't propose a solution yet — describe the pain. -->

### The shape of the solution

<!-- One paragraph. What would the feature look like from a user's perspective? A new CLI flag? A new module? A new tier? -->

### Prior art

<!-- Has another tool solved this? If yes, link the docs. If GateTest already does something close, link the module. -->

### Tier fit

<!-- Which pricing tier would this land in? Quick / Full / Scan+Fix / Nuclear / free CLI module. -->

### Anything else

<!-- Diagrams, code samples, links. -->
